tasks_completed: Create src/catalog.py with handler field and get() method + Create src/services.py with 3 registered service handlers
Create src/gateway.py with find_service (0 credits) and buy_and_call (dynamic credits)
learnings: Must use .venv/bin/activate to run python3 — system python3 lacks project deps
services.py defines handlers directly (not importing from server.py) to avoid NVM key sys.exit at import time
catalog.search() returns 'price' key (not 'price_credits') to match gateway API contract in spec
PaymentsMCP dynamic credits callable receives ctx={'args': {...}, 'result': ..., 'request': {...}} — use ctx['args']['service_id'] to look up price
NVM_GATEWAY_AGENT_ID takes precedence over NVM_AGENT_ID for the gateway; both are checked at startup
